case_title: HUTCHINSON, C.C. VS AC TRANSIT-A CAL CORP et al

docket_entries.description: THIS CLAIM IS AGAINST A GOVERNMENT AGENCY.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,250.00 FILED BY HUTCHINSON, C.C. AS TO DEFENDANT AC TRANSIT-A CAL CORP DOE, JOHN # 02149 ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-1999 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ACCOMMODATIONS BY PER- SONS WITH DISABILITIES AND ORDER SUBMITTED TO THE COMMISSIONER FOR SIGNATURE.
THE REQUEST FOR ACCOMMODATIONS IS GRANTED BECAUSE IT DOES NOT CREATE AN UNDUE BURDEN ON THE COURT. ORDER SIGNED BY COMMISSIONER SUE M. KAPLAN.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AC TRANSIT-A CAL CORP

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUTCHINSON, C.C. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AC TRANSIT-A CAL CORP DOE, JOHN # 02149 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
